raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Department of Public Health will explicitly ban synthetic tetrahydrocannabinol (THC) in hemp products.",
    "The emergency regulations will limit serving sizes of hemp products.",
    "The Governor's regulations aim to keep intoxicating products out of the hands of California’s children.",
    "Synthetic intoxicants are illegal according to California's regulations.",
    "Intoxicating cannabinoids are only available through licensed dispensaries in California.",
    "Improper age verification and testing for dangerous substances pose a threat to consumers and children in the hemp market.",
    "Hemp-sourced THC products are sold in gas stations, convenience stores, and wine shops without proper regulation.",
    "Governor Newsom's regulations will create a safer and more transparent marketplace for hemp products.",
    "The regulations aim to protect public health and ensure that unregulated products do not undermine California's cannabis laws.",
    "There is a belief that hemp-derived products can be regulated based on intoxication."
  ]
```
